title: Search Carefully
description: a Minecraft mod that adds a tactical search system similar to Tarkov,  allowing players to progressively uncover items in containers.
body:
# SearchCarefully
**SearchCarefully** is a Minecraft mod that adds a tactical search system similar to *Tarkov*, allowing players to progressively uncover items in containers.


## Features
- **Item Search System**: Perform step-by-step searches on items within containers to enhance the search experience.
- **Aesthetic Customization**: Fully customizable textures and sound effects.
- **Highly Configurable**: Supports different search durations for items based on their rarity levels.
- **Excellent Compatibility**: Works seamlessly with all structure loot chests.

## Effect Preview
![Effect Preview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8090a757fa15029be59af0360cafb799385f9d67.gif)

## Prerequisites 

**RarityCore** [[GitHub](https://github.com/Yanbwe/RarityCore)][[Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/mod/raritycore)]: Required dependency for item rarity identification.

## 😋Start Use ！

Want to apply search time to your loot, or modify the player's search speed?  
Want to customize the visuals of SearchCarefully?     
Want to use the API of SearchCarefully?     
Want to use placeholder items for SearchCarefully?  
**Please refer to this page -> [SearchCarefully Wiki](https://github.com/Yanbwe/SearchCarefully/wiki).**
